description: A tech startup wants to ensure it is properly documenting its expenses to qualify for the Research and Development (R&D) tax credit.

nodes.task_description: Explain the four-part test the IRS uses to define qualifying research activities.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly communicates the eligibility criteria.

nodes.task_description: Review the company's projects to identify which activities likely qualify.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent helps the company identify its qualifying research projects.

nodes.task_description: Advise the company on how to track and document qualifying research expenses (e.g., employee wages, supplies, contract research).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides a clear action plan for documentation to support a future credit claim.
